subject: [PATCH] mm/mempolicy: add sysfs interface to override NUMA node bandwidth

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Suggested that userland could perform a simple calculation to determine the preferred weighting, but ultimately recommended posting the patch as an RFC due to concerns about its upstream viability.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: The patch proposes adding a sysfs interface to override NUMA node bandwidth, but the discussion revolves around its feasibility and whether it should be posted as an RFC.
